title:
@coreyganim: my top 3 from this list and how to turn each into a real business:

1. OpenClaw ...
rawContent:
Tweet by @coreyganim (Corey Ganim)
Author bio: Simplifying AI for non-technical entrepreneurs. Built an eCom biz to $16M+ revenue. Built (then sold) a coaching biz to $340k ARR.
Text: my top 3 from this list and how to turn each into a real business:

1. OpenClaw (Agent Framework)
→ set up personalized AI agents for local businesses
→ connect to their WhatsApp, Telegram, email
→ charge $3-5K per build + $500/mo to maintain
→ one client = one afternoon of work

2. n8n (Workflow Automation)
→ build automated workflows for service businesses (lead follow-up, client onboarding, reporting)
→ charge $1-3K per automation
→ stack 3-5 automations per client = $5-15K deal size

3. Firecrawl (Web Scraping for AI)
→ build competitive intelligence dashboards for agencies and ecommerce brands
→ scrape competitor pricing, reviews, content daily
→ AI summarizes changes into a weekly briefing
→ charge $1-2K/mo per client as "market intel as a service"

you don't need to master all 60. pick one. learn it this weekend. sell it next week.
